div.h2: Module 4: Statistics Collection Points & Metrics Definition

ul.li: Hot (热): Executed in the critical path of memory access. Must be O(1).
Warm (暖): Executed periodically (e.g., every T ticks) or on page faults.
Cold (冷): Involves physical I/O or heavy metadata updates.
dirty_evictions incremented only if PTE_DIRTY bit is set.
thrashing_warnings triggered when fault frequency > THRASH_THRESHOLD.

g.title: Bitmap search for free swap page
Scan of page fault frequency window
Memcpy to buffer + Disk I/O + Metadata Update
Selection of victim and dirty bit check
